description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 21 (Saturday), I participated in a tree-planting ceremony for the Tenranzan Azalea Flower Park, held at Central Park (below the parking area).

This tree-planting ceremony was organized by the Hanno District Community Development Promotion Committee and carried out with the support of the Hanno Rotary Club.

I have high hopes that this park will become a beloved new flower destination for residents and many visitors, offering beautiful flowers including azaleas—the flower of Hanno City—to enjoy after the cherry blossom season.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13342.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Tree-Planting Ceremony for Tenranzan Azalea Flower Park
